info.title: SiteOps API
info.description: Internal API surface of the SiteOps platform. Stable v1 contract; see `docs/04-api-spec.md` for envelope, auth and pagination conventions.

tags.name: Alerts
tags.description: Alert rules, channels and dispatched events.

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Agent task queue (claim / complete / fail / heartbeat).

tags.name: Hooks
tags.description: Inbound webhooks from CF / GitHub + admin replay.

bearerAuth.description: API key minted via `/settings/api-keys`. The scope set on the key must include every scope listed under the path.

cookieAuth.name: authjs.session-token
cookieAuth.description: Browser-only Auth.js session cookie for dashboard requests.

details.description: Optional structured detail payload (e.g. Zod flattened errors).

plaintext.description: Returned only once at creation. Display to the admin then forget.

error.description: Set when this queue could not be reached (e.g. transient Redis error). Counts in that case are zeros.

get.description: Returns the logged-in admin profile. Requires a valid session cookie.

delete.description: Soft delete: sets `status=archived`. Use a PATCH to revive.

get.description: Returns bucketed uptime + latency points. Granularity is auto-selected from the requested window. When `?cursor=...` is supplied, the route switches to cursor-paginated tail-list mode (T36) and returns `{ items: UptimeCheck[] }` with `CursorPaginationMeta` instead of the aggregate shape.

200.description: Aggregate shape by default; cursor-paginated `UptimeCheck` list when `?cursor=` is set.

data.description: Service-layer row; structure follows the underlying DB schema.

post.description: Attaches a new domain row to an existing site.
Used by Agents / CI to upload a deployment record. Either `(provider, providerDeploymentId)` or `commitSha` must be set; idempotent on either pair via the DB unique index.

get.summary: Get an audit run by id
List findings produced by an audit run

get.description: Supports both `?page=N` offset and `?cursor=...` keyset pagination (T36).

200.description: Paginated list. Meta is `OffsetPaginationMeta` when `page` is used, `CursorPaginationMeta` when `cursor` is used.

post.summary: Report a single error or batch
post.description: Used by site-side SDKs. Accepts either a single report or an array (max 100 items).

post.description: Marks the event as ack-ed by the current admin and freezes future re-fires for the configured cooldown.

post.description: Re-POSTing with the same `dedupeKey` while a previous instance is still in-flight is idempotent and surfaces `meta.idempotent=true`.

post.summary: Atomically claim the next available task
post.description: Returns the leased task with a fresh `claimToken`. The caller must save the token and present it on heartbeat / complete / fail.

post.summary: Renew the lease on a claimed task
Mark a claimed task as completed
Mark a claimed task as failed (with optional retry)

get.description: Admin-only. Supports both legacy `?page=N` offset and `?cursor=...` keyset pagination — see T36 in `tasks/M8-api-contract`. API keys are deliberately rejected to prevent agents enumerating each other.

200.description: Paginated list. Meta is `OffsetPaginationMeta` when `page` is used, `CursorPaginationMeta` when `cursor` is used.

post.summary: Replay a previously ingested webhook event (admin)
post.description: Re-runs the dispatch path using the stored payload. Cannot replay rows with `signature_ok=false`.

get.description: Admin-only. Never returns the bearer hash; only metadata + scopes.

post.description: Mints a new API key. Plaintext is returned **once** in `data.plaintext`; subsequent reads of the row never expose it again.

patch.summary: Update mutable fields on an API key
patch.description: Currently only `rateLimitPerMin` is mutable post-creation. Pass `null` to clear the per-key override and restore the env default. The in-process API-key cache is invalidated so the new limit applies immediately on this replica.

delete.description: Marks the key as revoked; future Bearer requests fail with 401.

get.description: Returns the running build version, git SHA, Node runtime, and boot timestamp. Useful for confirming a deploy reached a given replica.
Returns `waiting / active / delayed / completed / failed` counts per queue. A failing queue surfaces with `error` set and zero counts; sibling queues are unaffected.

post.description: Stores the dashboard locale on the session. The browser also writes a `siteops-locale` cookie client-side for instant rendering.
